metadata.default_description: Modern surgical infrastructure in Quito for specialists and referred patients. Medium- and low-complexity procedures with comprehensive perioperative support.

footer.tagline: We streamline surgical and administrative workflows so specialists can focus on patients—with modern infrastructure, in-house medical staff, and end-to-end perioperative support.

cta.mobile_bar: Book a tour or message us

hero.headline: Surgical technology designed for
hero.sub: Modern infrastructure, sterile environments and specialized equipment for safety, efficiency and confidence in every procedure.

diff.title: Designed for predictable results

safety.body: Structured pathways, checklists, and clinical discipline at every step.

stay.title: Short-stay model
stay.body: Comfortable recovery aligned with ambulatory and short-hospitalization care.

infra.body: OR-ready spaces, controlled environments, and premium clinical aesthetics.

care.title: End-to-end support
care.body: Coordination from assessment through follow-up—without administrative noise.

b2b.title: Designed so you can operate with clarity and confidence.
b2b.lead: Ópera simplifies surgical coordination: fewer friction points, clearer timelines, and institutional support around your practice.

admin.title: Less administrative load
admin.body: We absorb operational detail so your team is not chasing loose ends.

coord.title: Aligned coordination
coord.body: One accountable workflow across pre-op, intra-op, and recovery.

backup.title: Clinical backup
backup.body: Perioperative support structured to complement your medical leadership.

speed.title: Responsive scheduling
speed.body: Agile programming for predictable surgical blocks.

safety.title: Safety-first culture
safety.body: Standards, protocols, and traceability you can present to patients with confidence.

ops.title: Operational partnership
ops.body: A premium environment that elevates how your practice is perceived—before the first visit.

process.title: Clear workflow from indication to follow-up
process.subtitle: A clear, enterprise-grade workflow from indication to follow-up.

1.title: Procedure assessment
1.body: Clinical and logistical feasibility aligned with your criteria.

2.title: Preoperative coordination
2.body: Documentation, timing, and patient preparation under one orchestrated plan.

3.title: Surgical scheduling
3.body: OR allocation with predictable turnover and premium readiness.

4.title: Perioperative support
4.body: Dedicated team support through induction, procedure, and immediate recovery.

5.title: Recovery & follow-up
5.body: Short-stay monitoring and structured continuity instructions.

infra.title: Infrastructure you can see and feel
infra.subtitle: Spaces engineered for sterility, calm, and precision—without the cold hospital cliché.

trust.title: Trust, standards, and institutional calm
trust.subtitle: We address the objections that matter most to specialists and referred patients—before they are even spoken.

bullets.protocols: Protocol-driven culture with traceable perioperative standards.
bullets.staff: Experienced in-house team aligned to specialist-led care.
bullets.support: Comprehensive support across scheduling, preparation, and recovery.
bullets.modern: Modern, premium environment that signals seriousness and control.

final.title: Book a tour and see how Ópera can optimize your surgical practice.
final.sub: We will walk you through workflows, spaces, and coordination—no pressure, full transparency.

about.title: About Ópera
about.intro: Ópera Surgical Center is a private surgical facility in Quito focused on medium- and low-complexity procedures—with a premium experience for specialists and patients.
about.vision: To be the reference private surgical center in Ecuador for specialists who demand agility, safety, and institutional-grade support.
about.mission: To deliver modern infrastructure, disciplined coordination, and human perioperative care—so every procedure day feels controlled, calm, and excellent.

excellence.title: Medical excellence
excellence.body: Rigorous standards and continuous improvement across clinical and operational practice.

safety.title: Safety culture
safety.body: Structured checks, clear accountability, and environments designed for controlled workflows.

innovation.title: Modern operations
innovation.body: Technology-forward processes that reduce friction for teams and patients.

infrastructure_page.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure_page.intro: A visual walkthrough of the spaces that power predictable surgical outcomes—ORs, recovery, short stay, sterilization, and premium reception.
infrastructure_page.gallery_caption: Representative environments—lighting, materials, and circulation designed for premium clinical work.

specialties_page.title: Specialties
specialties_page.intro: Structured pages for SEO and clarity. Each specialty highlights how Ópera supports your procedures with infrastructure and perioperative backing.
specialties_page.cta_body: Tell us your specialty and typical case mix—we will map support, documentation, and scheduling.

plastic.name: Cirugía plástica
plastic.desc: Procedimientos estéticos y reconstructivos con recuperación ambulatoria en un entorno privado y controlado.

derm.name: Dermatología quirúrgica
derm.desc: Espacios preparados para procedimientos dermatológicos ambulatorios con soporte clínico y recuperación inmediata.

gyn.name: Ginecología
gyn.desc: Infraestructura y coordinación para procedimientos ginecológicos de corta estancia y rápida recuperación.

uro.name: Urología ambulatoria
uro.desc: Flujos eficientes para procedimientos urológicos seleccionados con alta el mismo día.

ent.name: Otorrinolaringología
ent.desc: Soporte quirúrgico para intervenciones ORL ambulatorias con protocolos orientados a confort y seguridad.

oph.name: Oftalmología
oph.desc: Entorno diseñado para procedimientos oftalmológicos programados con recuperación breve.

vascular.name: Cirugía vascular menor
vascular.desc: Coordinación y soporte para procedimientos vasculares ambulatorios de baja complejidad.

maxilo.name: Cirugía maxilofacial
maxilo.desc: Espacios quirúrgicos preparados para procedimientos maxilofaciales ambulatorios y recuperación controlada.

specialists_page.title: For specialists
specialists_page.intro: Ópera exists to remove friction from your surgical practice: coordination, environment, and institutional perception—aligned to your leadership in the OR.
specialists_page.why: You keep medical authority while we elevate operational precision: scheduling discipline, perioperative staffing, and a premium patient experience that reflects your brand.
specialists_page.how: We start with your case profile and preferences, align protocols, then co-design scheduling and patient communication—so the day of surgery feels inevitable, not improvised.
specialists_page.back: In-house medical support, institutional coordination, and a facility built to communicate safety before a word is said.
specialists_page.schedule: Contact our coordination desk with the proposed procedure and timing window. We return a structured plan—including documentation checklist and OR readiness timeline.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.intro: Fast channels for specialists, patients, and international partners. Prefer WhatsApp for immediate routing to coordination.
contact_page.form_note: This form opens your email client with a prefilled message—no data is stored.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
